gold.title: Carousel3dselect
gold.reason: 3D carousel-style select with perspective, radius, and color-coded options — a visually spectacular, one-of-a-kind component that immediately elevates any feature showcase or pricing selector.

gold.title: Color Emotion Select
gold.reason: Color-coded options with emoji indicators and custom trigger styling — a visually distinctive select great for mood, category, or tag selection on marketing sites.

gold.title: Live Preview Style Select
gold.reason: Each option shows a live CSS preview of the style it represents — a rare, demo-quality component that visually communicates choices, ideal for theme or design-tool landing pages.

gold.title: Visual Grid Select
gold.reason: Grid of image/thumbnail previews inside a popover for selection — ideal for template, theme, or layout pickers on website-builder marketing pages.

gold.title: Tag Cloud Select
gold.reason: Popularity-weighted tag cloud with color support and inline search — a visually rich multi-select that looks polished on interest or skill selectors on landing pages.

gold.title: Select
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated dropdown with description text, icon slot, and disabled states — polished, feature-rich custom select that substantially upgrades the standard shadcn dropdown.

gold.title: Animated Select
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated option entrance and caret rotation — smooth, visually distinctive animated select that elevates any form or filter on a marketing site.

gold.title: Multiple Selector
gold.reason: Fully-featured, composable multi-select with filtering, async loading, and tag chips — a production-quality component that handles real marketing site needs with visual polish.

silver.title: Multi Select Combobox
silver.reason: Type-safe multi-select combobox with customizable options — well-built and reliable for forms, but visually standard shadcn conventions.

silver.title: Combobox
silver.reason: Input combined with a predefined item list — a clean combobox pattern suitable for search-and-select fields in contact or filter forms.

silver.title: Root Toggle
silver.reason: Section-switching select with icons, descriptions, active state tracking, and glass morphism — well-designed for site navigation selectors; slightly too app-nav specific for pure form use.

silver.title: Async Select
silver.reason: Async data loading select with React and shadcn/ui — a reliable pattern for dynamic dropdowns on forms, e.g. country or city selectors, but no notable visual upgrade.

silver.title: Member Selector
silver.reason: People-picker select with avatar/member display — useful for team invite flows on SaaS marketing pages, with above-average visual richness.

silver.title: Multi Select
silver.reason: Multi-select with tag chips — clean and functional for category or filter selection; follows standard patterns without strong visual differentiation.

silver.title: Input with Inner Tags
silver.reason: Input field that accumulates selected tags inline — from a reputable library, clean and practical for newsletter interest or skill forms.

silver.title: Behavioral History Select
silver.reason: Remembers and surfaces recent selections with a history section — a thoughtful UX enhancement useful on search or configuration forms.

silver.title: Select
silver.reason: Multi-size Vercel Geist-inspired select recreation — clean, well-engineered design-system-level component with good size variants.

silver.title: Select 1
silver.reason: Ark UI based select with clean list collection API — solid accessibility and composition, slightly above shadcn baseline visually.

bronze.title: Select (Native)
bronze.reason: Native HTML select styled to match shadcn/ui — functional but the browser-native element severely limits visual customization potential.

bronze.title: Select
bronze.reason: Generic select wrapper with no notable visual or functional additions over the shadcn Select primitive.

bronze.title: Select 1
bronze.reason: react-aria-components based select — good accessibility foundation but visually indistinguishable from a default shadcn select.

bronze.title: Select 1
bronze.reason: Multi-size native-style select without the Geist polish of shugar__select — a more basic variant that adds little visual value.

bronze.title: Select 1
bronze.reason: Base UI select component — accessibility-focused but visually minimal; no upgrade over shadcn defaults for marketing site redesign.

bronze.title: Breadcrumb
bronze.reason: This is a breadcrumb navigation component, not a select — misclassified in the selects folder and provides no value as a form input.

bronze.title: Baggage Add On
bronze.reason: A travel-booking specific baggage selection UI — highly domain-specific, no practical utility for general marketing site redesigns.
